creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
Hello, thank you for submitting a port. This looks good, but can you provide QA, portlint -AC and build logs if possible.

* PORTEPOCH should not be set on new ports.
* COMMENT and pkg-descr should not contain the same message.


I'm not a python guru (yet) so someone from python@ should also take a look and provide a comment. Adding python@ to CC.
